calendar.matters:
Notice And Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-22-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF NICHOLAS RUIZ' Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. THE COURT AWARDED $1,360.00 IN SANCTIONS. Moving party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Not reported =(301/PJB)
